nasb.text: the owner of the pit shall make restitution; he shall give money to its owner, and the dead animal shall become his.

esv.text: the owner of the pit shall make restoration. He shall give money to its owner, and the dead beast shall be his.

cnv.text: 井主要賠償，要把銀子還給牛主或驢主，死的牲畜可以歸自己。

ccb.text: 井的主人就要赔偿牲畜的主人，死牲畜则归井的主人。
